aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to insufficient conversational content and missing schema markup, but there is potential for improvement.

Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, accurate hours, and a high rating, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed HowTo guides and leveraging LocalBusiness schema to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services visible to the next generation of search engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI to cite their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating conversational content, and optimizing their GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, and waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven search landscape.
